{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = White Knight
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[White Knight]] retired.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[White Knight]] possesses speed and cloud-like weapons.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
